layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border/40 bg-background hidden md:flex flex-col
layout.main_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6
layout.card: bg-surface border border-border/40 rounded-sm p-4 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform duration-200

components.button: rounded-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-xs px-4 py-2 transition-colors
components.input: rounded-sm border-border/40 bg-transparent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary transition-all font-mono text-sm
components.badge: rounded-sm px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest

filament_manager.description: Grid or List of filaments. Each row shows brand, material (PLA/PETG), hex color preview, weight, price, and auto-calculates cost per gram (€/g).
filament_manager.ux_rules: Use the 'color_preview' component for the hex color. Highlight €/g in mono font to emphasize the financial aspect.

print_cost_calculator.description: Form to input print details (grams, print hours, minutes, failures). Auto-calculates material cost, fixed costs (depreciation + electricity), labor, and suggests a retail price based on profit margin.
print_cost_calculator.ux_rules: Layout as a 2-column bento box. Left: inputs. Right: real-time receipt/summary showing cost breakdown.

sales_log.description: Table tracking print jobs sold, date, revenue, calculated profit.
sales_log.ux_rules: Dense table, right-align numeric columns. Use green text for profit.

dashboard.description: KPI widgets (Total Profit, Revenue, Filaments used) and charts.
dashboard.ux_rules: Follow 'Control Room' mode. 1-span for KPI cards, 2-span for revenue chart, 1-span for top products list.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react and @phosphor-icons/react for high-end technical icons.
Ensure all user-facing text is in ITALIAN (e.g., 'Gestione Filamenti', 'Calcolatore Costi', 'Dashboard', 'Registro Vendite', 'Acquisti').
Use standard Shadcn UI components but heavily modify the borders (use rounded-sm instead of rounded-lg) and shadows (remove them, use flat design with 1px border).
Use JetBrains Mono or IBM Plex Sans for all numeric data (costs, grams, hours) to ensure tabular alignment.
Add 'dark' mode configuration with the provided palette to establish the tech-heavy 3D printing feel, and implement a theme toggle.
For the cost calculator, use a receipt-style right pane that updates instantly as inputs change.
Add a CSV Export button on the Sales Log table. Implement simple browser-based CSV generation.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and major sections as per E1 rules.
Ensure the sidebar is collapsible on desktop and becomes a drawer/sheet on mobile.
